channel.title: Algorithm on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Algorithm on Arrans github.io

item.title: dominikbraun/graph
item.description: A library for creating generic graph data structures and modifying, analyzing, and visualizing them.

item.title: mxgmn/ConvChain
item.description: Bitmap generation from a single example with convolutions and MCMC

item.title: shivamMg/trie
item.description: A Trie implementation in Go meant for auto-completion use cases. Supports Levenshtein distance search.
